SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-09-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:52am
Judge Pro Tem Robert Kane, clerk-Beth Wilber, Dept. 525, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Christel Heinelt, appears in Pro Per; Respondent, Thad Warren, appears in Pro Per.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Kane.
11:45am
Matter is submitted. No new evidence is marked or retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-21-2009 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
